ddls:
CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "degree" TEXT /* Degree offered (e.g., BSc, MSc) */,
  "total_credits_required" INTEGER /* Total credits required to graduate from the program */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department offering the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "hours_per_week" INTEGER /* Number of hours per week the course is taught */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits the course is worth */,
  "total_credits" INTEGER /* Total credits required for the course */,
  "semester_id" INTEGER /* ID of the semester */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_semester_id FOREIGN KEY ("semester_id") REFERENCES semesters ("semester_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "semesters" (
  "semester_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each semester */,
  "semester_name" TEXT /* Name of the semester (e.g., I, II) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the semester */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the semester */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the semester */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("semester_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the student is enrolled in */,
  "enrolment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrolment */,
  "expected_graduation_date" TEXT /* Expected graduation date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolled */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "semester_id" INTEGER /* ID of the semester */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade received in the course */,
  "grade_date" TEXT /* Date of grading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_semester_id FOREIGN KEY ("semester_id") REFERENCES semesters ("semester_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credits_accumulated" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "semester_id" INTEGER /* ID of the semester */,
  "total_credits" INTEGER /* Total credits accumulated by the student in the semester */,
  "cgpa" REAL /* Cumulative Grade Point Average (CGPA) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id", "semester_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "internships" (
  "internship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each internship/project */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "semester_id" INTEGER /* ID of the semester */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits for the internship/project */,
  "company" TEXT /* Name of the company or project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the internship/project */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the internship/project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("internship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_internships_semester_id FOREIGN KEY ("semester_id") REFERENCES semesters ("semester_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_internships_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transcripts" (
  "transcript_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transcript entry */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "semester_id" INTEGER /* ID of the semester */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade received in the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Credits for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transcript_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transcripts_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transcripts_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transcripts_semester_id FOREIGN KEY ("semester_id") REFERENCES semesters ("semester_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., student, faculty, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., login, view transcript) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_requirements" (
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course requirement */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "semester_id" INTEGER /* ID of the semester */,
  "mandatory" INTEGER /* Indicator if the course is mandatory (true/false) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("requirement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_requirements_semester_id FOREIGN KEY ("semester_id") REFERENCES semesters ("semester_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_requirements_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_requirements_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)
